sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110553" key="ferekra/teion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φερεκράτειον</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέτρον,</foreign> metre <sense id="n110553.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">used by Pherecrates,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:10:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
